raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need command to delete regular files under /system. Use find. Probably: find /system -type f -delete.
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need command to delete regular files under /system. Use find. Probably: find /system -type f -delete.

task.query: Remove regular files in the /system directory tree
task.gold: find /system -type f -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 echo rm | sh -x
